title: notifications-in-app — trait composition
description: Zero owned traits. This channel has no Eloquent models — delivery rows are written to core's NotificationDelivery table via DispatchGateway. Consumed traits documented for completeness but not directly applied here (no models to apply them to).

consumed.note: No models in this module. The framework, foundation, and tenants trait blocks are consumed indirectly — InAppChannel writes to core's NotificationDelivery model which composes them.
